items_fr: 1. Prie le  Conseil de securite d'adopter d'urgence des sanctions globales et obligatoires contre le regime raciste d' Afrique du Sud en vertu du Chapitre VII de la Charte des Nations Unies;

items_en: 1. Requests the Security Council to adopt urgently comprehensive and mandatory sanctions against the racist regime in South Africa under Chapter VII of the Charter of the United Nations;

4. Condemns the economic and other cooperation which some Western States and other States continue to bring to the racist regime in South Africa;

6. Calls upon all Governments that have not yet done so:
(a) To break all diplomatic, military, nuclear, economic, cultural, civil, sports and other relations with the racist regime of South Africa;

c) De  refuser  d'accorder des  contrats  ou  facilites aux  societes  transnationales  qui  collaborent  avec I' Afrique du Sud;

items_en: l. Endorses the recommendations of the Special Committee against Apartheid concerning its programme of work, contained in paragraphs 437 and 438 of its report 74;
